title: Software as a Service
description: Software hosted and maintained by a third party, accessed via the web, with data storage and monetization managed by the host.

definitions.definition: Software hosted and maintained by a third party, accessed via the web, with data storage and monetization managed by the host.
definitions.sources:
- [Open Data Handbook](https://opendatahandbook.org/)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
